title: Admin console
subtitle: Manage platform users, team spaces, account security, and usage data.

nav.workspaceHint: Open the content and spaces workspace

overviewCards.users: Manage users, space access, roles, and security.
overviewCards.resources: Review and govern every demo resource on the platform.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Manage platform accounts, space access, and resource usage.

resource.title: Resource management
resource.subtitle: Review, filter, and govern demo resources across every space.
resource.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{title}}”? Its published revisions, share links, and analytics data will also become unavailable.

governance.fullscreenFailed: The browser could not enter full screen. Check its permissions and try again.
governance.trafficTrendHint: Compare daily views, visitors, and completed sessions; hover for details
governance.stepConversionHint: Review visitor retention from the first step onward
governance.shareHistoryHint: Each link retains independent analytics, security policy, and creator history
governance.exportHistoryHint: Generated files, storage locations, formats, and processing status
governance.downloadHistoryHint: Proxy downloads confirm completion; S3/CDN links are completed by log ingestion
governance.auditHint: Audit trail for publishing, shares, exports, downloads, and administrator governance

organizations.title: Team spaces
organizations.subtitle: Manage team spaces, members, and invitations.
organizations.teamSubtitle: Invite members and configure their access.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Track account security, recording lifecycle, and sensitive platform operations.

details.summaryHint: Review the target, actor, source, and execution result.
details.clientHint: Full client details are shown here without expanding the list.
details.changesHint: Compare field values before and after this operation.
details.noChanges: No field changes were recorded for this operation.

models.title: AI model management
models.subtitle: Configure model services, credentials, and capabilities for the platform.
models.emptyHint: Add an OpenAI-compatible service to enable AI copy generation.
models.testSuccess: Connection and JSON generation verified in {{value}} ms
models.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{name}}”? Historical usage data will be retained.
models.formHint: Cloud services and self-hosted gateways using OpenAI Chat Completions are supported.
models.keyHint: The credential is encrypted at rest and never returned to the browser.

aiSettings.title: Global AI settings
aiSettings.subtitle: Control whether the platform may call configured models and tune full-generation batching.
aiSettings.switchHint: When disabled, recording and editor flows cannot create AI jobs even if a model is enabled.
aiSettings.noModel: The global switch is on, but no model is enabled, so AI remains unavailable.
aiSettings.chunkHint: Controls how many steps each full-generation request sends. Larger batches add context but make each request heavier.

usage.title: AI usage analytics
usage.subtitle: Analyze token consumption and performance by model, team, user, and resource.
usage.trendHint: Daily input and output tokens; hover for details
usage.detailsHint: Token and performance data for every upstream request
usage.search: Search request ID, model, or operation

storage.title: Storage management
storage.subtitle: Manage server-local directories and S3-compatible object storage.
storage.testSuccess: Connection and read/write check passed in {{value}} ms
storage.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{name}}”? Deletion is blocked while files or platform references remain.
storage.deployTitle: Container-local directories require a shared mount
storage.deployHint: The same local path must exist in both API and Worker containers. Compose mounts DOCFLOW_HOST_STORAGE_DIR at /storage-data.

formHint.local: Enter a path inside the container backed by a persistent host disk in production.
formHint.s3: Supports Amazon S3, MinIO, and compatible S3 endpoints from other cloud providers.

fields.name: Configuration name
fields.localPathHint: Only directories under /data or /storage-data are allowed.
fields.endpointHint: Leave blank for Amazon S3; use the complete HTTPS endpoint for compatible services.
fields.publicBaseHint: Optional. Uses public URLs when set, otherwise short-lived signed URLs.

browser.name: Name
browser.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{name}}”? Objects still referenced by the platform are protected.

recycle.title: Recycle bin
recycle.subtitle: Deleted content is retained for 30 days and can be restored or permanently removed.
recycle.purgeConfirm: Permanently delete “{{title}}”? This cannot be undone.

details.summaryHint: Confirm the content and ownership of this item.
details.noDescription: This resource has no presentation description.
details.deletionHint: Review the content before restoring or permanently deleting it.

jobs.title: Task center
jobs.subtitle: Inspect, troubleshoot, and manage AI generation and resource export jobs across the platform.
jobs.search: Search task ID, resource, user, model, or format

actions.retryConfirm: Run this task again? A new task will be created and the original record retained.
actions.cancelConfirm: Cancel this task? A running worker process will be terminated.

details.summaryHint: Review ownership, execution parameters, and progress.
details.timelineHint: Key events from creation through completion.
details.metadataHint: Version, model, and output information for troubleshooting.
details.resultHint: Structured output returned by the AI task.

overview.trendHint: Switch dimensions to inspect growth, traffic, and AI consumption
overview.trafficHint: Popular resources ranked by sessions, with owners and unique visitors
overview.exportsHint: Recent formats, resources, users, and processing states
overview.failuresHint: AI and export failures with causes and affected resources

detail.title: User details
detail.subtitle: Account profile, permissions, and resource usage
detail.accountHelp: Update the user's profile, platform permissions, and interface preferences.
detail.name: Display name
detail.usageHelp: Review this user's content footprint and audience activity across the platform.
detail.selfProtection: Your own role and status cannot be changed here to prevent an administrator lockout.

teams.title: Team space associations
teams.description: Review and manage this user's team spaces, team roles, and current space.
teams.allLinked: This user is already associated with every team space.
teams.platformRoleNote: Platform and team roles are independent. Platform administrators can manage every team space without becoming team members.

spaces.title: Space management
spaces.subtitle: Manage team and personal spaces, ownership, resources, quotas, and lifecycle in one place.
spaces.createHelp: Create an isolated collaboration space and assign its first owner. Platform administrators are not added automatically.
spaces.name: Space name
spaces.personalLifecycle: Personal space lifecycle follows its owner account
spaces.selectDescription: Select a space to inspect ownership, resources, quotas, and settings.
spaces.ownershipDescription: The owner controls settings and permissions. Personal-space ownership is bound to the account.
spaces.ownerImmutable: Ownership is maintained with the user account
spaces.basicSettingsDescription: Renaming does not change the stable identifier or existing resource links.
spaces.archiveDescription: Archiving blocks edits, revokes public shares, and retains the space in the recycle bin for 30 days.
spaces.archiveConfirm: Archive “{{name}}”? All public shares will be revoked immediately.
spaces.resourceListHint: All active resources and storage used in this personal space.
spaces.noResources: This personal space has no resources.

types.personalHint: Default spaces bound one-to-one with users

spaces.quotaHint: Choose a plan and optionally override individual limits for this workspace.

quotas.title: Quota management
quotas.subtitle: Configure workspace plans, monitor usage health, and analyze platform resource growth.
quotas.noHistory: Daily history will build after the first automatic collection

platformLimits.title: Platform limits
platformLimits.hint: Define the safety boundary that no quota plan or workspace override may exceed
platformLimits.boundaryTitle: Quotas enforce limits; monitoring owns alerts
platformLimits.boundaryHint: This page only sets assignable maximums. Configure utilization, near-limit, and exceeded alerts in Monitoring with thresholds, duration, severity, and notification channels.
platformLimits.metricSafe: All existing plans and spaces are within this boundary
platformLimits.previewSafe: The proposed boundary does not affect existing plans or spaces.
platformLimits.previewAffected: The proposed boundary is below existing values and affects {{plans}} plans and {{spaces}} spaces.
platformLimits.confirmTitle: I reviewed and explicitly accept this impact
platformLimits.confirmHint: Saving will not silently truncate or rewrite existing quotas. Existing values remain grandfathered, but future edits or assignments must fit the new boundary.

summary.overrideHint: At least one metric has an override

plans.title: Quota plans
plans.editHint: Set capacity and enforcement for each metric; storage and traffic use MB
plans.defaultHint: Spaces without an explicit assignment inherit the default plan
plans.deleteConfirm: Delete quota plan “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.
plans.deleteDefaultHint: The default plan cannot be deleted. Set another plan as default first.
plans.deleteInUseHint: This plan is used by {{count}} workspaces. Reassign them before deleting it.
plans.deleteAvailableHint: No workspaces use this plan, so it can be safely deleted.

analysis.currentHint: Select a metric to update the trend and growth ranking

security.title: Security actions
security.description: Manage sign-in credentials, sessions, and the account lifecycle.
security.resetHelp: Setting a new password immediately revokes all of this user's active sessions.
security.resetDone: Password reset. The user must sign in again.
security.selfResetHint: Use Personal settings to change the current administrator password.
security.deleteHint: The user will be disabled and moved to the recycle bin, and all sessions will be revoked immediately.
security.deleteConfirm: Delete {{name}}? This user's resources and data will also be deleted.

selectUser: Select a user from the list to view details.
